Today would have been mom’s 70th birthday

Today I would have been celebrating her with her

Instead I applied for 7 jobs in person desperate for a job ASAP

Desperate b/c money from school ran dry
😰

10/730

4/6 for my car payment 
4/9 for my cell phone 

Can you help me?

I noticed that too. I was at the San Diego event and they estimated 40k. No way!  It’s was bigger than last time when they estimated 50k. It was packed today and we were finishing when others were just starting the over one mile route.

One is a coincidence. Two is an event. Three is a trend.
